hero.title: Welcome to
hero.subtitle: Books in Chinese (Simplified and Traditional characters), English, and Russian.
hero.since: Our bookshop has been shipping orders worldwide since {{year}}.

categories.title: Browse by Category
categories.booksDesc: Theology, lives of saints, liturgical texts, church history, and more — our full collection of printed and digital Orthodox Christian literature.
categories.audiovideoDesc: Audio CDs of Orthodox liturgical music and choral works, plus the film "Faith of Saints" — multimedia resources for spiritual enrichment.
categories.churchSuppliesDesc: Hand-painted icons and frankincense for your home or parish — sacred items to support Orthodox worship and prayer life.

features.curatedDesc: Carefully selected books from Orthodox publishers worldwide, ensuring doctrinal soundness and spiritual value.
features.qualityDesc: All our books are printed on high-quality paper with durable bindings, built to last for generations.
features.churchDesc: Proceeds support our parish ministries and charitable works in the local community and abroad.

product.author: Author
product.paidEbookNote: This is a paid e-book. Preview available, purchase required for full download.
product.notFoundDesc: The book you're looking for doesn't exist.

cart.title: Shopping Cart

empty.title: Your Cart is Empty
empty.description: Looks like you haven't added any books to your cart yet.

cart.items: {count, plural, =0 {No items} one {# item} other {# items}}

errors.cartLoadFailed: Failed to load cart. Please try again.
errors.paymentInitFailed: Failed to initialize payment. Please try again.
errors.emptyCart: Your cart is empty. Please add items before checkout.
errors.belowMinimumAmount: Order total is below the minimum payment amount ({min} {currency}). Please add more items.

placeholders.deliveryInstructions: Leave at door, ring doorbell, etc.

shippingSection.unableToLoad: Unable to load shipping options for this country. Please try another country.
shippingSection.noMethods: No shipping methods available for the selected country. Please select a different country or contact us for assistance.

payment.failed: Your payment was not successful. Please try again.

confirmation.title: Order Confirmed!
confirmation.thankYou: Thank you for your purchase. We've received your order and will send you a confirmation email shortly.
confirmation.step1: We'll send you an email confirmation with your order details
confirmation.step2: Your order will be processed within a few business days
confirmation.step3Before: If you ordered e-books, you can download them in

login.title: Sign In
login.failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.description: Sign in to your account to access your orders and favorites

register.title: Create Account
register.description: Join our community of Orthodox readers
register.captchaNotConfigured: Captcha is not configured. Please contact support.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Your Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for that email, we have sent a password reset link. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
forgotPassword.failed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.
forgotPassword.captchaNotConfigured: Captcha is not configured. Please contact support.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: The password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.failed: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out with any questions, comments, or prayer requests.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.success: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.
contact.captchaNotConfigured: Captcha is not configured. Please contact the site administrator.
contact.errorMessage: Failed to send message. Please try again later.
contact.formDescription: Have a question about an order, a book recommendation, or just want to say hello? Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.shippingAnswer: Domestic orders typically arrive within 5-7 business days. International orders may take 2-4 weeks depending on the destination.
faq.specificBookQuestion: Can I request a specific book?
faq.specificBookAnswer: Absolutely! If you're looking for a specific title not in our catalog, let us know and we'll do our best to source it for you.
faq.physicalStoreQuestion: Do you have a physical bookstore?
faq.physicalStoreAnswer: Yes, we have a small bookstore in our church, you can visit us during the church service hours and purchase books in person.

bookshelf.title: My Bookshelf
bookshelf.subtitle: Your purchased books in one place
bookshelf.emptyDescription: Purchase books to see them here.
bookshelf.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to remove "{title}" from your bookshelf?

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences
profile.newsletterDescription: Receive updates about new books and products
profile.error: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.error: Failed to change password. Please try again.
changePassword.passwordsSame: New password must be different from current password

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.warning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All of your data, order history, and account information will be permanently deleted. Please type your password to confirm.
deleteAccount.confirmDialog: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action is PERMANENT and cannot be undone. All your data will be lost forever.
deleteAccount.error: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

orders.subtitle: View and track your past orders
